zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg是Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge和Isabel Ros的女兒，出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 在 克利夫蘭。她和Nicholas de Engaine至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1323年之後在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg是Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge和Isabel Ros的女儿，出生在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 在 克利夫蘭。她和Nicholas de Engaine至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1323年之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg was born in Skelton in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge and Isabel Ros. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Nicholas de Engaine. She died after 1323, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg est née à Skelton in Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge et Isabel Ros. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Nicholas d’Engaine. Elle est décédée après 1323, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg wurde in Skelton in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge und Isabel Ros geboren. Sie hatte mit Nicholas de Engaine mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1323 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg è nata il nel Skelton in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge e Isabel Ros. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Nicholas de Engaine. Morì dopo il 1323, nel England.

ja.Skelton in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン イン クレベランド
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconbergはイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン イン クレベランドでWalter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord FauconbergeとIsabel Rosの娘として生まれた。彼女はNicholas de Engaineとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1323年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg(은)는 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴 인 클레벨랜드에서 Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge(와)과 Isabel Ros의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Nicholas de Engaine(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg nasceu em Skelton in Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge e Isabel Ros. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Nicholas de Engaine. Ela faleceu após 1323, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg родилась в местности скелтон ин кливеланд, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge и Isabel Ros. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Nicholas de Engaine. Она умерла после 1323 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauconberg nació en Skelton in Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge y Isabel Ros. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Nicholas de Engaine. Murió después de 1323, en Inglaterra.
